"'''Inside the 501st'''" is an article that appeared in [[Star Wars Insider 96|''Star Wars Insider'' 96]]. Written by [[Kevin Christley]] and featuring uncredited photography by [[Bill Blackburn]], it is a follow-up to the [[Star Wars Insider 58|''Star Wars Insider'' 58]] article "[[New Heirs to the Empire: The Fighting 501st|The Fighting 501st - A Legion of Fans]]."

The article covers everything you ever wanted to know about joining the Empire with the 501st Legion, but were too afraid to ask. It details a brief history of the fan-run Imperial Costuming organization known as the [[501st Legion (fan organization)|501st Legion of Stormtroopers]], why fans join the Legion, membership requirements, how to put together an Imperial costume, their involvement with [[Lucasfilm]], and the numerous contributions Legion members make on behalf of children's charities.
